data.title: Bürch Use Cases: 7 Ways to Automate Ad Management
data.excerpt: Discover how Bürch (ex-Revealbot) automates ad management for Facebook, Google, and Instagram. Boost ROI with AI-powered rules and reporting. Try it free!

$media.alt: Bürch Use Cases: 7 Ways to Automate Ad Management

children.text: Let's cut to the chase: manually managing ads across Facebook, Google, and Instagram is a recipe for burnout and missed opportunities. I've been there—refreshing dashboards, adjusting bids at 2 AM, and hoping I didn't blow the budget. That's until I discovered
Bürch

(you might know it as Revealbot), and it fundamentally changed how our team operates. It's not just another tool; it's like giving your marketing team a brilliant, tireless co-pilot who handles the grunt work with AI-powered precision.
See how Bürch can transform your workflow
This platform is all about
automation that actually understands context

. You're not just setting simple "if X, then Y" rules. You're building intelligent systems that can scale budgets on winning campaigns, pause ads that are underperforming, and generate reports that highlight what *truly* matters—all while you focus on strategy and creative. If you're tired of putting out fires and want to build a predictable growth engine, you're in the right place.
1. Automating Scale & Pause Rules for Meta Ads

This is the bread and butter for most teams, and Bürch executes it flawlessly. Imagine this: you have a winning ad set on Facebook. Its ROAS has been above 4 for three days straight. Instead of you manually checking and raising the budget, Bürch does it instantly based on the rule you set—maybe increasing spend by 20% each time the threshold is met.

Conversely, if an ad set's cost per result exceeds your target, Bürch can pause it automatically, saving you from a slow budget bleed. The beauty is in the granularity. You can set conditions based on spend, frequency, CPA, and even combine multiple metrics.
Learn the step-by-step for setting up these powerful rules
. It's the kind of hands-off control that lets you actually sleep through the night.
2. Cross-Platform Budget Optimization with AI
Here’s where Bürch pulls ahead of basic automation tools. The
AI-Powered Budget Optimization

feature doesn't just react to past performance; it helps you proactively allocate spend where it's likely to generate the best results. You define your overall monthly budget and your core goal (like lowest CPA or highest ROAS), and the AI dynamically distributes spend across your connected Facebook and Google campaigns throughout the day.

It’s like having a dedicated analyst constantly watching the flow of money and shifting it to the most promising opportunities in real-time. This is incredibly powerful for e-commerce businesses running multiple product lines or agencies juggling several client campaigns.
Discover the new features that make this AI even smarter
3. Building Unified Reporting & Alerts

Toggling between Facebook Ads Manager, Google Ads, and Instagram analytics to compile a weekly report is a time sink. Bürch acts as a central hub, pulling key metrics from all platforms into a single, customizable dashboard. You can build reports that matter to *you*—maybe blending spend from all channels, conversions from a specific landing page, and overall ROAS.
Even better, set up
real-time alerts

. Get a Slack notification if your daily spend on Google hits 80% of its limit before noon, or if any campaign's CTR drops below a certain point. This isn't just reporting; it's creating an early-warning system for your entire ad ecosystem. The peace of mind is worth it alone.
Explore why this centralized approach is a game-changer
4. Managing Multiple Client Accounts (For Agencies)

If you run an agency, the thought of applying complex automation rules to 10+ client ad accounts probably makes you break a sweat. Bürch scales beautifully here. You can create rule templates once and apply them across different ad accounts, ensuring consistent best practices without repetitive setup.

The pricing model, based on total monthly ad spend, is also agency-friendly. As your clients' spend grows, you move to the next tier, but you're managing everything from one login. It turns client onboarding and performance management from a chaotic chore into a streamlined process.
See how agencies leverage Bürch for growth
5. A/B Testing Automation & Creative Rotation
Finding your next winning ad creative is an ongoing process. Instead of manually scheduling tests and pulling the plug on losers, let Bürch automate it. You can set rules to:
Automatically enable
the next creative in a rotation after a test reaches statistical significance.
Pause ads
with a high cost per click after a set number of impressions.
Increase budget
for test variants that show early promise.
This systematic approach removes human bias and speed from the testing cycle, allowing you to iterate on creative much faster than your competitors.
6. Lead Generation & Funnel-Specific Optimization

For lead gen businesses, the goal isn't just any conversion—it's a qualified lead. Bürch can connect to your CRM or lead tracking system (via webhooks) to make decisions based on *downstream* data. Set a rule to increase budget for campaigns that generate leads at a target cost-per-lead, and decrease spend for those whose leads don't convert into sales calls.
This closes the loop between ad spend and actual business value, moving beyond top-of-funnel vanity metrics. It’s the level of sophistication that separates good marketers from great ones.
Understand the core platform capabilities
7. Integration with Your Broader Tech Stack
Bürch plays well with others. Its webhook and integration capabilities mean you can connect it to the other tools in your arsenal. Trigger an automation rule in Bürch from a change in your
n8n
workflow.
See how n8n and Bürch can work together
. Or, use ad performance data to trigger a follow-up sequence in
Manychat
Explore Manychat integration ideas
. This extensibility means Bürch isn't a silo; it becomes the command center for your entire marketing operation.
New & Standout Features to Watch
Bürch (formerly Revealbot) is always evolving. Recently, they've doubled down on making AI more accessible and actionable. Look out for:
Enhanced AI Insights:
Clearer explanations for why the AI is making certain budget shifts, so you learn as you automate.
Expanded Channel Support:
Deeper integration and rule capabilities for platforms like TikTok Ads.
Advanced Reporting Widgets:
More ways to visualize cross-channel data and share insights with non-technical stakeholders.
These updates show a platform that's listening to marketers and building for the future of automated performance marketing.
Who is Bürch Ideal For?
While powerful, Bürch isn't for every single marketer. It's an ideal match for:
Growth-Focused SMBs & Startups:
Teams spending $5K+/month on ads who need to maximize every dollar and scale efficiently without hiring a dedicated performance manager.
Performance Marketing Agencies:
Managing multiple clients who need consistent, scalable results and clear reporting.
E-commerce Brands:
Running dynamic product ads and catalog sales across multiple platforms, where constant bid and budget adjustments are critical.
Data-Driven Marketers:
Anyone who believes in letting data, not gut feeling, drive daily optimizations.
If your ad spend is growing and your manual management is hitting a ceiling, it’s time to see what intelligent automation can do.
Ready to put your ad management on autopilot? Start your free trial of Bürch here

children.text: How does Bürch (Revealbot) pricing work?

Bürch pricing is based on your total monthly ad spend across all connected ad accounts. They offer an Essential plan starting at $49/month for up to $10K spend. You get a 14-day free trial, and there are discounts for annual billing. No overage fees apply if you exceed your plan's ad spend limit.
Can Bürch really replace manual ad management?

Absolutely, for the repetitive, rule-based tasks. Bürch excels at automating day-to-day optimizations like bid adjustments, budget scaling, and pausing underperformers 24/7. This frees up marketers to focus on higher-level strategy, creative development, and deep analysis—which is where the real value lies.
Is it difficult to set up Bürch?

Not at all. The onboarding is straightforward—you connect your ad accounts via OAuth, and their interface for building rules is intuitive, using a visual builder. While the logic can get sophisticated, they provide great templates and a knowledge base to get you started quickly.
